top_signals.title: India Steps Up Stake Sales as Iran War Strains Finances
top_signals.summary: The asset-sale push comes even as India’s equity capital market activity has slowed over the past two months.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Industrial Metals Set for Best Month Since January on Iran Truce
top_signals.summary: Industrial metals headed for their best monthly gain since January after the US and Iran reached a tentative deal to extend their ceasefire by 60 days.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Philippines' Marcos on Building a Legacy of His Own
top_signals.summary: Heir to the Philippines' most famous political dynasty, President Ferdinand 'Bongbong' Marcos Jr has had to contend with the complicated history of his family name. Now with two years left in his single-term presidency, Marcos is facing the economic consequences of a rupture in global geopolitics, a rapidly changing technological landscape, and a growing feud at home with his Vice President Sara Duterte, who is herself a successor of another prominent political family. In this latest episode of Latitude, the Philippine president opens up to Bloomberg's Haslinda Amin on how he is forging ahead to try and build a legacy of his very own.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Anthropic finalises $65bn funding deal to surpass OpenAI’s valuation
top_signals.summary: New round values Claude AI maker at $965bn including the latest money
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Gemini crypto exchange launches AI data feed powered by Grok
top_signals.summary: The move comes as Gemini continues to expand beyond spot crypto trading into derivatives, predictions, and other financial services.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: MLB owners push for salary cap in negotiations with MLB Players’ Association
top_signals.summary: MLB announced Thursday that it intends to seek a $245.3 million salary cap (including benefits).
